author: Movingly
text:
§9 deliverable-verb base changes

Implement BaseChange (the §8 verb-diff seam) for each §9 deliverable verb: Create stages a fresh tasks/<id>.md and rediscovers its id after a create/pre rename; Occupancy sets/clears claimant with claim's one hardcoded already-claimed guard; Update applies a generic FieldEdit list; Retire stages the file deletion for close/drop. finalize re-reads the post-pre tree and renders the §5 message, so the bl-op trailer separates close from drop. Git-free authoring keeps the impls unit-testable on a plain temp dir.
